creator: appleboy.tw@gmail.com
text:
I update devel/codeigniter-devel port to 2.0.1 reactor version, they don't
release 1.7.x any more.

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=154732

On Thu, Feb 10, 2011 at 9:23 AM, Greg Larkin <glarkin@freebsd.org> wrote:

>
> -----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
> Hash: SHA1
>
> The devel/codeigniter-devel port is already at version 2.0.  Are there
> no more scheduled or anticipated releases on the 1.7 branch?  I don't
> think it makes sense to have codeigniter and codeigniter-devel at the
> same version.
>
> Thank you,
> Greg
> - --
>
> Greg Larkin
>
> http://www.FreeBSD.org/           - The Power To Serve
